loop1.title: Power & Energy (Real-Time)
loop1.note: Showing input active power and nominal output apparent power — active/reactive energy and projected demand are not measured by this UPS asset.

loop1.title: Voltage Monitor (Real-Time)
loop1.note: Showing live three-phase output voltage trends (R, Y, B) and average/max/min KPIs for R-phase; structural axis ticks, thresholds, and legend values are omitted as they are not measured quantities.

loop1.title: Current Monitor (Real-Time)
loop1.note: Showing real-time output current for R, Y, and B phases plus neutral; legend item values are derived from their respective series data as no dedicated scalar columns exist for them.
